depression.topic: Feeling isolated due to Amelia's busyness
depression.description: I often feel so alone during the week because Amelia is so busy with her program. It makes me question if she really cares about me.
I take on all the household chores, and I resent it. I wish I could tell Amelia how I feel, but I don't want to upset her.
Whenever I don't hear from Amelia, I panic and think that something bad has happened or that she doesn't love me. It makes me feel so anxious and unsettled.
When I try to reach out to friends and they don't respond, I feel like nobody cares about me. It just reinforces my fear that I will end up alone.

Delusion.description: I can't shake the feeling that I'm unlovable and that people will abandon me. It's like I'm destined to be alone.
I often feel helpless and weak, like I can't stand up for myself. I worry that if I don't keep myself valuable to others, I'll be abandoned.

psychosis.description: When I do chores like laundry, I start to think about the future of my relationship with Amelia. It feels like I'm trapped in this role that I don't want.
When I feel neglected by my friends or Amelia, I end up crying and seeking support. It's hard to cope with those feelings of disappointment and hurt.
